title: foundation — artisan commands
description: Seven infrastructure commands. Audience is `ops` (deploy + on-call runbooks) or `dev` (local development). Every command follows Laravel's `signature` convention with named args + options.

commands.signature: module:list {--format=table : table|json|dot} {--filter= : substring match on module name}
commands.description: Lists every module discovered by ModuleRegistry, in dependency order. --format=dot outputs Graphviz DOT for visualizing the dependency graph; --format=json for programmatic consumption in CI.

commands.signature: module:sync {--dry-run : Show what would change without writing}
commands.description: Re-runs the module discovery pass + syncs config-backed catalogues (BusinessType, NotificationCategory, etc.) into `config/*.php`. Called on deploy + after any `data/*.json` fixture change.

commands.signature: module:diagnose {module? : Specific module, or empty for all}
commands.description: Validates a module's blueprint: schemas parse, relations resolve, trait composition matches the trait-order contract, health probes register. Fails with detailed output if any check trips. Used by CI + on-demand during migrations.

commands.signature: health:check {probe? : Specific probe, or empty for all} {--json}
commands.description: Walks the health probe registry synchronously + prints results. --json for machine-readable output. Used during incident response to diagnose stuck services from a shell.

commands.signature: cache:tags {--flush= : Flush cache entries matching these tag names (comma-separated)}
commands.description: Lists cache tag namespaces per module (from every caches.json) + supports flushing by tag. Handy during incidents to invalidate a subset of cache without a full `cache:clear`.

commands.signature: search:reindex {model? : FQCN or table name; empty = all} {--chunk=500} {--async}
commands.description: Rebuilds a Searchable model's index. --async dispatches IndexSearchableJob per chunk; without --async runs synchronously (useful during dev). Wired to schedule.json + POST /api/v1/platform/search/reindex.

commands.signature: search:flush {model : FQCN or table name} {--yes : Skip confirmation}
commands.description: Drops a model's search index. Rare — usually only during index-schema migrations. Prompts for confirmation unless --yes.
